## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint && bun run test && bun run build` all pass with no errors
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Docs updated if config/behavior changed (README / `docs/`)
- [ ] PR is focused on a single concern
- [ ] Not in conflict with the project's [non-goals](../README.md#non-goals)
